text_snippet: Constitution of Montenegro (hereinafter: Constitution) shall enter into force on the day of its promulgation by the Constitutional Parliament of the Republic of Montenegro, unless this Law provides di
Montenegro is an independent and sovereign state, with the republican form of government. Montenegro is a civil, democratic, ecological and the state of social justice, based on the rule of law.
Assemblies of local self-government units shall harmonise their regulations with the Constitution within one year as of the day when this Law entered into force at the latest.
In Montenegro, anything not prohibited by the Constitution and the law shall be free. Everybody is obliged to abide by the Constitution and the law.
The Government shall: 1. Manage internal and foreign policy of Montenegro; 2. Enforce laws, other regulations and general acts; 3. Adopt decrees, decisions and other acts for the enforcement of laws;

The Government shall consist of the Prime Minister, one or more Deputy Prime Ministers and the ministers. The Prime Minister represents the Government and manages its work.

The Prime Minister and the member of the Government shall not discharge duties of a Member of the Parliament or other public duties or professionally perform some other activity.

The basic form of the local self-government shall be the municipality. It shall also be possible to establish other forms of local self-government.
The municipality shall have the status of a legal entity. Municipality shall adopt the Statute and General Acts. Authorities of the municipality shall be the Assembly and the President.

The Municipality shall exercise certain property related powers over the state owned assets in accordance with the law. The Municipality shall have property. The Municipality shall be financed from it

The court shall rule in panel, except when the law stipulates that an individual judge shall rule. Lay-judges shall also participate in the trial in cases stipulated by the law.

article_id: Article 14. Separation of the religious communities from the State
text_snippet: Religious communities shall be separated from the state. Religious communities shall be equal and free in the exercise of religious rites and religious affairs.

Assets in state property shall belong to the state of Montenegro.
The state shall be financed from taxes, duties and other revenues. Every one shall pay taxes and other duties. Taxes and other duties can be introduced only by law.

text_snippet: The Constitutional Law shall be adopted for the enforcement of the Constitution. The Constitutional Law for the enforcement of the Constitution shall be adopted by the Parliament with a majority vote
This Law shall enter into force on the day of its promulgation.

Everyone shall have the right to equal protection of the rights and liberties thereof.

Everyone shall have the right to fair and public trial within reasonable time before an independent and impartial court established by the law.

article_id: Article 38. Compensation of damage for illegal action
text_snippet: Person deprived of liberty in an illegal or ungrounded manner or convicted without grounds shall have the right to the compensation of damage from the state.

text_snippet: The capital of Montenegro shall be Podgorica, The Old Royal Capital of Montenegro shall be Cetinje.

Freedom of entrepreneurship shall be guaranteed. Freedom of entrepreneurship may be limited only if so necessary in order to protect the health of the people, environment, natural resources, cultural
Laws and other regulations shall remain into force until they have been harmonised with the Constitution within the periods of time stipulated by this Law.
Montenegro shall guarantee and protect rights and liberties. The rights and liberties shall be inviolable. Everyone shall be obliged to respect the rights and liberties of others.
The right to succession shall be guaranteed.
A foreign national may be the holder of property rights in accordance with the law.
Everyone shall have the right to work, to free choice of occupation and employment, to fair and human working conditions and to protection during unemployment.

Social position of the employed shall be adjusted in the Social council. Social council shall consist of the representatives of the trade union, the employers and the Government.

Social insurance of the employed shall be mandatory. The state shall provide material security to the person that is unable to work and has no funds for life.

text_snippet: Special protection of the persons with disability shall be guaranteed.

article_id: Article 7. Prohibition of infliction of hatred
text_snippet: Infliction or encouragement of hatred or intolerance on any grounds shall be prohibited.
The state shall protect the consumer. Actions that harm the health, security and privacy of consumers shall be prohibited.
Marriage may be entered into only on the basis of a free consent of a woman and a man. Marriage shall be based on equality of spouses.
Family shall enjoy special protection. Parents shall be obliged to take care of their children, to bring them up and educate them. Children shall take care of their own parents in need of assistance.

article_id: Article 73. Protection of mother and child
text_snippet: Mother and child shall enjoy special protection. The state shall create the conditions that encourage childbirth.
A child shall enjoy rights and freedoms appropriate to his age and maturity. A child shall be guaranteed special protection from psychological, physical, economic and any other exploitation or abuse.
